title: Compact block scanning / wallet sync engine
description: Scan compact blocks from lightwalletd, trial-decrypt notes against wallet IVKs, persist discovered notes. Track scan tip (last block height) in wallet DB. Background tokio task that continuously syncs.
close_reason: Implemented scanner infrastructure: NoteDecryptor trait + NullDecryptor stub (IVK seam for nie-m91), CompactBlockScanner (fetch loop + per-block tip advance), spawn_scanner background task, WalletStore scan_tip/set_scan_tip with migration v3. Full test coverage for DB methods and NullDecryptor. Actual note decryption plugs in via NoteDecryptor when zcash_primitives is available.
